task_intent.subject_summary: Role reframe proposal — Lane_01 ↔ Lane_03 cross-Lane operating model
task_intent.nts_authorization: NTS-approved meta-instruction: Lane_01 = CTO autonomous within tech scope, NTS = strategic/vision only, multi-LLM consensus drives tech decisions before NTS approval on SHARED matters.
task_intent.coi_disclosure: Lane_01 is both proposer of this reframe AND proposed CTO-style operator. Disclosed transparently in MSG SECTION 4. Lane_03 veto authority preserved.

sections: 2. PROPOSAL SUMMARY (NTS / Lane_01 / Lane_03 role table)
3. ACKNOWLEDGE LANE_03 CONTRIBUTIONS (5 LOCKED skill rules, schemas, audits)
5. STRATEGIC GATES G1-G4 (scope boundary, consensus protocol, override/appeal, audit/measurement)

lane_03_position_acknowledged.lane_03_stance: strict-canon-gatekeeping; SHARED/laws + Roadmap V2 + skill implementation + schema/canon expansion all require explicit NTS-approved amendment evidence

validation.schema_validation: to be recorded after Step 2 validate_handoff.py run
validation.qa_gate: to be recorded after gate run

risks: Lane_03 may object to the reframe; this MSG explicitly accommodates that path (Q1 OBJECT branch + LAW_SYSTEM §8 arbitration in NEXT STEPS).
MSG length is substantial; readability addressed via 8-section structure with explicit headers.
Until NTS amendment is approved + applied, this MSG is a discussion-opener only, not an in-effect change. Snapshot+report make this constraint explicit.
